rationale.R1.6: "Clean this up" is canonically a writing-polish delegation: tighten verbose constructions, eliminate redundant hedges (e.g. repeated 'that we'), improve sentence rhythm, and sharpen paragraph cohesion — all sentence/paragraph quality concerns that are load-bearing here; failure to improve prose quality would invalidate the task.
